name: kredex
description: Kredex — AI financial autopilot for African micro & small businesses. Built for the Global AI Hackathon Series with Qwen Cloud (Autopilot Agent track).

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
